title: Ability to lock who can view a column AND ALSO lock who can edit the same column
excerpt: I want to be able to restrict guests from viewing a column in a shareable board, but I also want to restrict editing on that column to a certain team. It’s an approval column, so I don’t want our external users even seei…

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to restrict guests from viewing a column in a shareable board, but I also want to restrict editing on that column to a certain team. It’s an approval column, so I don’t want our external users even seeing that it’s there, and I don’t want everyone in the company being able to set the status to approved.
You should be able to have settings on viewing and editing on the same column

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
